description: CC v2.1.119 hook-execution spinner variant — the gerund + ellipsis is followed by parenthesized info '(running stop hook · 3s · ↓ 1 tokens)'. Captured by test-conpty/test-attention-false-match.mjs in 2026-04-26 probe. The regex stops at the ellipsis, so both plain and hook-execution variants match identically.
